hub.title: Nadeeb Platform

hub.delegatesDesc: Join the professional network and serve Guests of Allah with flexibility. Sign up now and get started right away.

delegates.heroBadge: Join the professional delegates network in Umrah sector
delegates.heroTitle: Your time is valuable — Nadeeb connects you with companies that need you
delegates.heroSubtitle: Professional Umrah delegate? Nadeeb connects you directly with licensed Hajj and Umrah companies. Work flexibly with multiple companies at the same time — multiple income sources from a single app.
delegates.why1: Work with multiple companies simultaneously — no exclusivity required
delegates.why2: Service requests are sent to you automatically based on your location and specialty
delegates.why3: Transparent and secure payments — receive earnings per completed service
delegates.why4: Build a professional reputation and receive ratings from companies
delegates.howStep2: Nadeeb team contacts you and activates your account
delegates.howStep3: Start receiving service requests from companies
delegates.howStep4: Complete the service and receive your earnings
delegates.formNote: Nadeeb team will contact you within 48 hours

companies.heroBadge: The #1 Field Operations Platform for Umrah Sector
companies.heroTitle: Your company serves the guests of Allah — Nadeeb manages the field for you
companies.heroSubtitle:
Every season brings the same pressure: fixed staffing costs, no system to track service execution or measure performance. When travel agencies send operation orders, manual follow-up begins.

Nadeeb provides professional field delegates near operational zones. You only pay per completed service — lower costs, higher efficiency.
flow1Steps: Nadeeb assigns the nearest available delegate
flow2Steps: Travel agency sends the operation order
You approve it on the platform
Nadeeb extracts & prepares the required services
PDF copy sent automatically to you and the agency
companies.why1: Delegates on demand — no fixed salaries or employment obligations
companies.why2: Foreign agency operation orders are received and approved directly on the platform
companies.why3: Track every service execution and measure KPIs from a single dashboard
companies.why4: Pay per completed service = higher spending efficiency
companies.formNote: A Nadeeb advisor will contact you to schedule a demo

investors.heroTitle: A SAR 20B+ Market — And the Field Segment Is Still Undigitized
investors.heroSubtitle: Nadeeb is a B2B2C platform connecting Hajj & Umrah companies with a professional delegate network. 15% commission per transaction, with revenue tied to guaranteed seasonality.
investors.metric1Label: SAR annual Hajj & Umrah market size
investors.why1: Specialized tech team in the religious tourism sector
investors.why2: Active partnerships with certified Hajj & Umrah companies
investors.why3: Field-tested platform with real delegates and companies
investors.why4: Undigitized field segment — clear market opportunity
investors.why5: Deliberate and phased regional expansion plan
investors.why6: Legal and financial team ready for due diligence
investors.formNote: All information is handled with complete confidentiality. We'll reach out to schedule an investment briefing.
